title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Omni Logistics India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Omni Logistics India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Omni Logistics India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Distribution Manager at our Ahmedabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Omni Logistics India:
Omni Logistics India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Omni Logistics India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
